acquisition method: scanned the samples in data-independent acquisition mode
alkylation reagent: modified with 10 mM iodacetamide for 30 min at 24 °C
cleavage agent: added a 50:1 ratio of trypsin and digested the venom
instrument: injected into an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid MS
labeling: peptides were injected into an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid MS
reduction reagent: added 5 mM DTT and incubated for 30 min
